headline: How The Evolving Story On McKesson (MCK) Is Shaping Its Valuation Outlook
summary: McKesson’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$990.87 to US$951.73, a reduction of about 4% in the latest model update. That shift lines up with a Street backdrop where some analysts are cutting price targets while others still point to upside from newer business lines. This leaves you with a more mixed signal on the stock’s risk and reward profile. Read on to see how these revised targets fit into the broader narrative and how you can keep track as views continue to evolve. Stay...
